tools.name: magicbell_list_broadcasts
tools.description: List broadcasts (notification-send batches) with cursor pagination. Read-only observability. Project API: GET /broadcasts.

tools.name: magicbell_get_broadcast
tools.description: Fetch a single broadcast by id. Project API: GET /broadcasts/{broadcast_id}.

tools.name: magicbell_list_users
tools.description: List users (notification recipients) with cursor pagination. Project API: GET /users.

tools.name: magicbell_get_user
tools.description: Fetch a single user by MagicBell user id or external id. Project API: GET /users/{user_id}.

tools.name: magicbell_list_events
tools.description: List notification delivery events with cursor pagination. Read-only observability. Project API: GET /events.

tools.name: magicbell_get_event
tools.description: Fetch a single delivery event by id. Project API: GET /events/{event_id}.

tools.name: magicbell_list_workflows
tools.description: List notification workflows with cursor pagination. Project API: GET /workflows.

tools.name: magicbell_list_workflow_runs
tools.description: List workflow runs (execution history) with cursor pagination. Project API: GET /workflows/runs.

tools.name: magicbell_get_workflow_run
tools.description: Fetch a single workflow run by id. Project API: GET /workflows/runs/{run_id}.

tools.name: magicbell_list_channels
tools.description: List delivery channels (in-app, email, push, SMS, etc.) with cursor pagination. Project API: GET /channels.

tools.name: magicbell_list_integrations
tools.description: List configured provider integrations (e.g. Sendgrid, APNs, FCM). Project API: GET /integrations.

tools.name: magicbell_create_user
tools.description: Creates a user (notification recipient) record in MagicBell. Additive — sends no notification. Provide at least one identifier (external_id or email). Project API: POST /users.

tools.name: magicbell_update_user
tools.description: Updates a user record (reversible; sends no notification). Project API: PUT /users/{user_id}.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: magicbell_list_broadcasts, magicbell_list_users, magicbell_list_events, magicbell_list_workflows, magicbell_list_channels · Private data: magicbell_create_user, magicbell_update_user · Public sink: magicbell_list_broadcasts, magicbell_get_broadcast, magicbell_list_channels, magicbell_create_user · Destructive: magicbell_get_workflow_run.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: magicbell_list_broadcasts, magicbell_list_users, magicbell_list_events, magicbell_list_workflows, magicbell_list_channels · Private data: magicbell_create_user, magicbell_update_user · Public sink: magicbell_list_broadcasts, magicbell_get_broadcast, magicbell_list_channels, magicbell_create_user · Destructive: magicbell_get_workflow_run

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
